name: Xiaopeng He
background: Mr. He is our co-founder, executive director, chairman of the board of directors and chief executive officer. Prior to founding our company, Mr. He served as the president of Alibaba Mobile Business Group and was in charge of the mobile browser, mobile search, and location-based services. He co-founded UCWeb Inc. in 2004 and served as its president.

company_affiliations.name: XPeng Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, Chairman of the Board

company_affiliations.name: Alibaba Group Holding Limited
company_affiliations.title_or_role: President of Alibaba Mobile Business Group (also served as President of UCWeb, Chairman of Ali Games, and President of Tudou)
